title: cirsium × stonum
intro: Cirsium × stonum, also known as the Stonewall Thistle, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is a cross between Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium heterophyllum. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cirsium × stonum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
